---
title: "CV (overview)"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: cosmo
lang: en
---

Aurélien Nicosia  
Lecturer - Department of Mathematics and Statistics  
**Université Laval (Québec, Canada)**  
[aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/web_site](https://aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/web_site)  
ORCID: [0000-0002-0974-9988](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0974-9988)



### Profile
Researcher and instructor in **statistics and data science**, interested in complex data modeling, computational statistics, and educational innovation.  
My work connects mathematical rigor, reproducibility, and open knowledge dissemination.  
I develop open-source tools and digital teaching environments.



### In brief
- 🎓 **Ph.D. in statistics**, Université Laval (2024)  
- 👨‍🏫 **Lecturer** and CDA coordinator, Université Laval  
- 🤝 **Course instructor**, UQAC (computer science and data science)  
- 💻 **Former R&D Director** - The Co-operators
- 🧠 **Core interests:** density estimation, HMMs, directional models, digital pedagogy



### Selected publications
- *A Multi-State Conditional Logistic Regression Model for Animal Movement*, *Annals of Applied Statistics*, 2017.  
- *A General Angular Regression Model for Data on Animal Movement*, *JRSS-C*, 2015.  
- *Behavioural State Inference Using Markovian Step Selection Functions*, submitted to *MEE*, 2025.



### Awards and grants
- **ULaval Star Teacher Award** (2014, 2023, 2024, 2025)  
- **PAIP grants** (2023-2026) - educational innovation and AI  
- **CALQ** (2024) - *Digital drawing with R*
